editionData.title: June 15, 2026: U.S. singer Oliver Tree among six killed in helicopter crash in Brazil; Amid years of war, these Israelis are still pushing for peace
editionData.description: Global headlines: U.S. singer Oliver Tree among six killed in helicopter crash in Brazil (The electro-pop singer attracted millions of fans across the world with hits such as "Life Goes On” and “Miss You.”); Amid years of war, these Israelis are still pushing for peace (As Israel’s longest period of sustained armed conflict drags on, the country’s diminished peace movement finds itself struggling to be heard on the sidelines); and U.S. and Iran to close deal within a day, Trump says, but Tehran yet to confirm (An agreement would extend the ceasefire and pave the way for a longer truce, leaders said, though an Iranian official denied a deal will be signed Sunday). Markets leaned higher, with 6 of 7 tracked indexes up; Nikkei 225 up 5.41% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: Your ePub Is Fine. Kobo Disagrees. Blame Adobe (Adobe isn’t exactly a beloved company these days. People begrudgingly use their stuff, because the Creative Suite is an industry standard...); Show HN: Kage – Shadow any website to a single binary for offline viewing (Shadow any website for offline viewing, with the JavaScript stripped out - tamnd/kage); and 21 years and counting of 'eight fallacies of distributed computing' (2025) (Eight long held and common beliefs about the network have been shown, time after time, to be false. What are they, and what do they mean). Product Hunt features Pool (Save anything with a screenshot), Cloudback for Linear (Automated backup and restore for Linear workspaces), and Permute 4.0 (The ultimate media converter for macOS).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: U.S. singer Oliver Tree among six killed in helicopter crash in Brazil
headlines.summary: The electro-pop singer attracted millions of fans across the world with hits such as "Life Goes On” and “Miss You.”

headlines.title: Amid years of war, these Israelis are still pushing for peace
headlines.summary: As Israel’s longest period of sustained armed conflict drags on, the country’s diminished peace movement finds itself struggling to be heard on the sidelines.

headlines.title: U.S. and Iran to close deal within a day, Trump says, but Tehran yet to confirm
headlines.summary: An agreement would extend the ceasefire and pave the way for a longer truce, leaders said, though an Iranian official denied a deal will be signed Sunday.

headlines.title: Global HIV prevention declined drastically after Trump aid cuts, U.N. finds
headlines.summary: Cuts from the U.S. and others have hit hard, with the number of people receiving PrEP dropping by 38% from 2024 to 2025, according to data from 62 countries.

headlines.title: U.S. and Iran close to signing ceasefire deal, officials say
headlines.summary: After days of uncertainty and tit-for-tat military strikes, "text of the peace deal has been reached,” according to Pakistan's prime minister.

headlines.title: US-Iran to sign a ‘peace deal’ on Friday: What we know so far
headlines.summary: Trump says a US-Iran deal will be signed this Friday, as Tehran confirms plans to end hostilities.

headlines.title: Trump allies cheer Iran ‘peace deal’ announcement as Democrats seek clarity
headlines.summary: US and Iran say memorandum of understanding to be signed on Friday, but no official terms yet released.

headlines.title: Zimbabwe’s climate migrants fear eviction as crackdown intensifies
headlines.summary: Many settled in Zimbabwe’s fertile Eastern Highlands after drought left their home areas unable to support farming.

headlines.title: US-Iran ‘peace deal’ announced; Trump says Strait of Hormuz reopening
headlines.summary: Trump announces that a ceasefire deal with Iran has been agreed, and that the Strait of Hormuz will reopen for shipping.

headlines.title: Six people killed as helicopters collide over Brazil’s Rio de Janeiro
headlines.summary: Two helicopters collided in midair before crashing into car park of electric vehicle dealership, fire service says.

headlines.title: Crude oil futures drop after Trump promises an Iran deal will be signed Friday
headlines.summary: Oil prices had already fallen quite dramatically on Thursday and Friday, in anticipation of an imminent deal. President Trump has posted online that the Strait of Hormuz will reopen after the deal is signed on Friday.

headlines.title: 2-2 draw for Japan and the Netherlands in World Cup opener for both
headlines.summary: Daichi Kamada scored on a header off Koki Ogawa's corner kick in the 88th minute, sending the Samurai Blue fans into a frenzy and giving Japan a 2-2 draw with the Netherlands in their World Cup opener.

headlines.title: Havertz sparks Germany's 7-1 rout of Curaçao after underdogs' historic 1st goal in World Cup
headlines.summary: Kai Havertz scored two goals as Germany pulled away from World Cup first-timer Curaçao late in the opening half and piled on after that in a 7-1 win in a group match.

headlines.title: Fate of historic slavery exhibit targeted by Trump hangs in the balance
headlines.summary: A federal judge has temporarily blocked President Trump's order to remove some exhibits at national parks. One historic site targeted by that order faces an uncertain future.

headlines.title: The U.S. and Iran announce a deal to end the war
headlines.summary: President Trump said the U.S. would remove its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and said a deal will be signed on Friday.

headlines.title: Protest staged in Geneva against upcoming G7 summit
headlines.summary: GENEVA - A massive demonstration was staged on Sunday afternoon in Geneva to protest against the Group of Seven (G7) summit which will be held in the French town of Evian from Monday to Wednesday.

headlines.title: Carney warns against courting Washington
headlines.summary: DUBLIN — Canada's Prime Minister Mark Carney continued his efforts to pivot away from the United States and align with Europe, meeting with the leader of Ireland on Saturday ahead of the upcoming G7 summit and saying middle powers should not compete for favor with Washington.

headlines.title: Death toll from Gaza conflict surpasses 73,000 since October 2023: medical sources
headlines.summary: GAZA - Medical sources at the Gaza-based health authorities said on Sunday that the total death toll from the Israel-Hamas conflict in Gaza since Oct 7, 2023, has surpassed 73,000.

headlines.title: China seeks greater imports from Europe
headlines.summary: China stands ready to import more from Germany and the rest of Europe, Ling Ji, vice-minister of commerce and deputy international trade representative of China, said on Thursday, emphasizing the complementary nature of China-Germany economic relations and the vast opportunities offered by the Chinese market.

headlines.title: Peace deal with Iran to be signed on Friday
headlines.summary: The United States and Iran will sign a peace deal on Friday, US President Donald Trump announced on Sunday.

headlines.title: NDA inches towards two-thirds majority in Rajya Sabha; short in Lok Sabha despite TMC rebellion
headlines.summary: NDA moves closer to a two-thirds majority in Rajya Sabha while facing challenges in the Lok Sabha amid TMC defections.

headlines.title: Constitutional expert questions plan of TMC rebel MPs to seek ‘real TMC’ status from Speaker
headlines.summary: Constitutional expert P.D.T. Achary asserts that TMC rebels must approach the Election Commission, not the Speaker, for recognition.

headlines.title: Indian Army unveils new uniform policy, phases out colonial-era practices
headlines.summary: The Indian Army's new uniform policy modernises attire by phasing out colonial practices while preserving traditions and professional standards.

headlines.title: 'Obedient servant, complies with orders: Rahul slams PM over U.S. statements
headlines.summary: Rahul Gandhi criticizes PM Modi for complying with U.S. orders following the deaths of Indian sailors in attacks.

headlines.title: India, France adopt Innovation Roadmap 2030, Economic Security Dialogue
headlines.summary: India and France unveil an Innovation Roadmap 2030, enhancing cooperation and economic security during Modi and Macron's bilateral talks.

headlines.title: Trump veers toward exit in Iran war but risks loom
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump veers toward exit in Iran war but risks loom.

headlines.title: Gold rises 2% after US, Iran reach peace deal
headlines.summary: Reuters: Gold rises 2% after US, Iran reach peace deal.

headlines.title: UK, France, Germany and Italy ready to lift Iran sanctions after US-Iran deal
headlines.summary: Reuters: UK, France, Germany and Italy ready to lift Iran sanctions after US-Iran deal.

headlines.title: US, Iran reach preliminary agreement to end war, signing set for Friday
headlines.summary: Reuters: US, Iran reach preliminary agreement to end war, signing set for Friday.

headlines.title: Dollar hits 10-day low as US, Iran reach peace deal
headlines.summary: Reuters: Dollar hits 10-day low as US, Iran reach peace deal.
